tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Creates one TickTick task in a project. Omit project_id to create the task in Inbox. For Inbox use exactly project_id="inbox".

project_id.description: Optional project reference. For Inbox use exactly "inbox". For other projects use a real project id or exact project name. Do not pass "inbox/default/входящие".

due_date.description: Optional due date or datetime. Relative dates should already be resolved before calling the tool.

is_all_day.description: Whether the task should be treated as an all-day task.

time_zone.description: Optional IANA timezone used to normalize due_date and start_date.

tools.name: create_task_with_subtasks
tools.description: Creates a parent task and its subtasks in one backend operation. Use this when the user asks for a task together with subtasks.

subtask_titles.description: Titles of subtasks to create under the new parent task.

project_id.description: Optional project reference for the parent task. For Inbox use exactly "inbox". For other projects use a real project id or exact project name. Omit to create the parent task in Inbox. Do not pass "inbox/default/входящие".

content.description: Optional notes for the parent task.

due_date.description: Optional due date or datetime for the parent task.

start_date.description: Optional start date or datetime for the parent task.

is_all_day.description: Whether the parent task is all-day.

time_zone.description: Optional IANA timezone used to normalize parent task dates.

priority.description: TickTick priority value for the parent task.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: Lists TickTick tasks and can filter by status, project, or search text. Use this first when you need to find a task and obtain its real task_id before calling tools that require task_id. To list Inbox tasks, call list_tasks with project_id="inbox".

project_id.description: Optional project reference to limit the task list. For Inbox use exactly "inbox". For other projects use a real project id or exact project name. Do not pass "inbox/default/входящие".

search.description: Optional case-insensitive search matched against task title and notes. Use this to find the task before calling tools that require task_id.

tools.name: get_task_details
tools.description: Gets one TickTick task with its current fields. Requires a real task_id. Never pass a task title in task_id. If you only know the title, first call list_tasks or update_task_by_search to find the task and extract its real id.

task_id.description: Real TickTick task_id only. Never put a task title here.

tools.name: create_subtasks
tools.description: Creates subtasks under an existing parent task. Requires the real parent task_id. Never pass a task title in task_id. If you only know the title, first call list_tasks to find the parent task and extract its real id. The backend resolves the parent's project automatically.

task_id.description: Real parent task_id only. Never put a task title here.

titles.description: Titles of subtasks to create under the parent task.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Updates editable fields of one TickTick task. Requires a real task_id. Never pass a task title in task_id. If you only know the task by name, first find its id via list_tasks or use update_task_by_search.

task_id.description: Real TickTick task_id only. Never put a task title here.

is_all_day.description: Whether the task should be all-day.

time_zone.description: IANA timezone used to normalize new date fields.

project_id.description: Optional target project reference if the task should move. For Inbox use exactly "inbox". For other projects use a real project id or exact project name. Do not pass "inbox/default/входящие".

tools.name: update_task_by_search
tools.description: Finds one open task by text and updates it only when the match is reliable. Use this when the user names a task but you do not yet know its real task_id. project_id is the target project for moving the matched task; search_project_id only limits where to search.

search.description: Search text used to find the task by title or notes when task_id is not known yet.

is_all_day.description: Whether the task should be all-day.

time_zone.description: IANA timezone used to normalize new date fields.

project_id.description: Optional target project reference if the matched task should move. For Inbox use exactly "inbox". For other projects use a real project id or exact project name. Do not pass "inbox/default/входящие".

search_project_id.description: Optional project reference that only limits where to search for the task. For Inbox use exactly "inbox". For other projects use a real project id or exact project name. Do not pass "inbox/default/входящие".

prefer_due_date.description: Optional preferred local due date in YYYY-MM-DD when several tasks match.

prefer_today.description: Prefer a task due today when several tasks match.

exact_title.description: Require an exact title match before updating.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: Lists TickTick projects and can filter them by id or name. Inbox is a special default project and should appear as project_id "inbox" to the model, while the backend resolves its real TickTick id.

query.description: Optional case-insensitive filter by project name or id.

tools.name: list_upcoming_tasks
tools.description: Lists open tasks due soon, using localized dates for sorting and presentation.

days.description: How many days ahead to include.

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return.

include_overdue.description: Whether overdue tasks should be included.

include_without_due_date.description: Whether tasks without a due date should be appended after dated tasks.

project_id.description: Optional project reference to limit the list. For Inbox use exactly "inbox". For other projects use a real project id or exact project name. Do not pass "inbox/default/входящие".

tools.name: move_task
tools.description: Moves one task to another project. Requires a real task_id. Never pass a task title in task_id. If you only know the task by name, first call list_tasks to find the task and extract its real id. To move to Inbox, call move_task with project_id="inbox".

task_id.description: Real TickTick task_id only. Never put a task title here.

project_id.description: Destination project reference. For Inbox use exactly "inbox". For other projects use a real project id or exact project name. Do not pass "inbox/default/входящие".

tools.name: mark_complete
tools.description: Marks one task as completed. Requires a real task_id. Never pass a task title in task_id. If you only know the task by name, first call list_tasks to find the task and extract its real id.

task_id.description: Real TickTick task_id only. Never put a task title here.
